summary: Add scripts/sync_taxonomy.py: parses taxonomy.toml, upserts concept_families and concept_family_membership rows (is_primary=1 for TOML primaries, demote-then-upsert on moves), replaces alias rows for owners mentioned in TOML with Python str.lower() applied before INSERT. --dry-run default; --apply commits. Report counts per §7 step 7. Per design.md §7.

resolution.note: sync_taxonomy.py per §7: family/node/primary-membership upserts (demote-then-upsert), lowercased alias replacement, dry-run(default)/apply with rollback-based preview, FK-enforced, §7 report+worklists. Does not touch is_primary=0. 12 unit tests + scratch-DB smoke (12 families/88 primaries, idempotent, FK-clean). Full suite 243 passed (sole failure pre-existing unrelated chunking).
